userIntent.raw: Resume Hivefiver localization/TUI refactor from completed Phase 2A into Phase 2B, using orchestration-first flow with context verification, bounded implementation delegation, and verification gates.

tasks.title: Map JSON-to-TUI render pipeline across hm-init hm-doctor hm-settings and config dashboard surfaces
Define smallest safe vertical slice for Hivefiver config-dashboard TUI foundation
Define smallest safe hm-settings 40/60 dashboard proof slice
Implement hm-settings command-path 40/60 dashboard proof with read-only pane40 and internal pane60
Verify end-to-end hm-settings dashboard proof on bounded scope
Summarize proven foundation and deferred extensions

briefing.summary: User confirmed 40/60 layout and clarified the 60-pane is internal Hivefiver display only. Active slice is now the hm-settings command-path dashboard proof.
briefing.workflowState: Foundation work narrowed to a command-path proof instead of generalized renderer rollout.
followUp: Implement additive hm-settings dashboard adapter using existing runtime snapshot/status and settings/question-gate data.
Run bounded verification and manual proof before any broader rollout claims.

anchors.description: Shifted from generic TUI proof to hm-settings command-path 40/60 dashboard proof after user clarified pane ownership and constraints.
